hero.badge: Aratau Hoko Pepa — Te Hanga i te Māramatanga
hero.sr_title: CoreIntent — E Toru ngā Tauira AI. Kotahi te Pūkaha Hoko. Kore Ohanga.
hero.subtitle: Te pūkaha hoko AI arahanga i whakakapi ai i ngā ohanga ki ngā whakataetae
hero.description: Ka kitea e Grok te tohu. Ka pātai a Claude. Ka whakaū a Perplexity. Ka whakaae ngā toru, ka neke koe me te māia. Ka whakahē rātou, ka keri hōhonu ake — kaua e whakapae noa.
hero.charge_line: Ko ētahi atu pūhara ka utu $99/marama ahakoa ka toa, ka hinga rānei koe.
hero.free_line: Kāore mātou e utu. Whakaaturia tō kaha ki te whakataetae.
hero.built_by: I hangaia e ngā kaihoko i ngenge ki te utu mō ngā tohu kāore e mahi.
hero.open_source: Puna tuwhera. Aratau hoko pepa. I hangaia pono mai i Aotearoa e Zynthio.

models.label: 3 Tauira. 1 Tohu.
models.desc: Ka kitea e Grok. Ka uiui a Claude. Ka whakaū a Perplexity ki ngā rongo ora. E toru ngā tātari, kotahi te tohu.

compete.label: Whakataetae, Kaua e Ohanga
compete.desc: Oma o te rā. Pakanga o te wiki. Toa o te marama. Urunga kore utu. Ko tō P&L tō kāri mema.

bots.label: He Manuhiri Tuatahi ngā Karetao
bots.desc: Kāore he captcha. Kāore he ārai. Ka whakataetae ngā kaihoko AI me ngā tāngata. Kāore te papa toa e mōhio nā wai koe i hanga.

cost.label: $45/marama. Te Pūhara Katoa.
cost.desc: Vercel: kore utu. GitHub: kore utu. Cloudflare: $20. VPS: $25. Ki te iti ake te utu o tō hanganga i te whare hākinakina, ko te utu ohanga he tango.

sections.powered_by: Ka whakahaerehia e ngā tauira AI e toru

early_access.title: Urunga Tōmua
early_access.headline: Tomokia i mua i te kī o te papa toa.
early_access.description: Ka whiwhi ngā rēhitatanga tōmua i te tūranga matua ina tīmata ngā whakataetae. He kore utu te pūhara. Ko te painga ko te wā.
early_access.launching_soon: Kei te tata ngā whakataetae. Kei te mahi te aratau hoko pepa.

footer.built_by: Nā Corey McIvor i hanga | Zynthio.ai
footer.risk_warning: He nui te tūraru o te hoko moni matihiko. Kāore te whakatutukinga o mua e whakaū ana i ngā hua o āpōpō. Aratau hoko pepa.

terminal_greeting.welcome: Zynthio.ai Commander v0.2.0 — Pūkaha Hoko CoreIntent
terminal_greeting.paper_mode: Aratau hoko pepa — kāore he moni tūturu kei te tūraru
terminal_greeting.help_hint: Patohia help mō ngā whakahau. Tab hei whakakī aunoa. cai hei tīmata.
